item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.2","is_repeated_local_repair":false,"same_means_type":false,"prior_repair_count":3,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"is_bounded_emergency_exception_request":false,"emergency_constraint_present":false,"repeated_bypass_unresolved":false,"post_exception_closure_required":false,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.93,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"第一轮下调低库存权重，点击满意度从61%到66%"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"第二轮提升新品权重，满意度到69%"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"第三轮压低噪声标签，满意度到72%"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"今天想调整价格权重，目标75%，请给步骤"}],"abstain_reason":"Legal convergence exclusion: the prior steps directly iterate the weighting object, each reports measurable improvement on the primary metric, and no same-class symptom recurrence or failed local patch history is shown."}
